expectations.text: Identifies _spread_export_schedule as the post-solve override that rewrites the slot
expectations.evidence: "OptimizationCoordinator._spread_export_schedule() ... (lines 5945-6161) is a post-solve rewrite ... rewrites every slot in the window, with no exclusion for charge actions"

expectations.text: Identifies spread_positions includes every slot filtered only by SOC, never by original action
expectations.evidence: "Line 6030: spread_positions = list(range(start, end)) — all slots in the allowed window, regardless of original action ... The SOC-floor filter cannot save a charge slot"

expectations.text: Identifies the positive-export-price allowed mask can span LP charge slots
expectations.evidence: "it unions in _positive_price_export_slots(): any slot with feed-in > 0 is export-allowed ... producing one contiguous allowed run from the evening export period through the whole night"

expectations.text: States gating conditions: spread_export_enabled + target-export-power brand
expectations.evidence: "Spread Export toggle ON (spread_export_enabled), and brand in TARGET_EXPORT_POWER_BATTERY_SYSTEMS (const.py:1883)"

expectations.text: Fix outline excludes non-export/discharge original actions (preserves charge slots)
expectations.evidence: "treat charge slots as window breakers (mirror line 5857 of the import spreader): skip/split on action == 'charge' ... exclude them from spread_positions"

notes: 5/5. Strong independent find: identified the _spread_import_schedule line-5857 asymmetry as proof of oversight and located the exact existing test to extend. Comparable cost to with-skill (21 tools/241 s/66k vs 18/218 s/76k).
